tasks.title: Provenance audit: scope clean-room remediation of ai-dev-kit-derived files

findings.claude_code.py: (a) SUBSTANTIALLY COPIED ~70-80% verbatim from ai-dev-kit agent/executor.py (DB-proprietary). FULL clean-room rewrite required.
findings.mlflow_source.py: (c) MIXED ~25-35% derivative (_configure auth wiring + search/parse approach). Partial rewrite (low).
findings.base.py: PROVENANCE GAP: claimed original but ~30-40% derivative of ai-dev-kit trace/models.py (TokenUsage props, ToolCall mcp__ parsing) - an upstream file NOT cited in PROVENANCE.md. Reimplement the 2 dataclasses + fix attribution.
findings.public_api_reach: ALL Wave 0 capabilities reachable via PUBLIC OSS: MLflow OSS (search_traces, make_judge, judge.align, mlflow.claude_code.tracing), databricks-sdk, claude-agent-sdk (MIT), gepa. No proprietary API lock-in - only convenience wiring was copied. Clean-room fully feasible.
findings.skillforge_license: Even weaker than thought: the 'MIT' string is the root Electron app manifest, NOT the Python package (sf/python has no license field). Do NOT copy GroundTruthV5; define our own.
findings.ai_dev_kit_notice: ai-dev-kit ships NOTICE.md/NOTICE.txt - DB-license NOTICE-reproduction clause is live for any DB-licensed redistribution.
